name: TANUKI

abilities.name: Beer Goggles
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model suffer a (-) to their duel if the attacking model has a friendly Poison token.

abilities.name: Not-So-Secret Sake
abilities.text: Friendly Scheme markers within 6" gain the hazardous (Poison) terrain trait.

actions.name: Jug Swing
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target is within 6" of a friendly Scheme marker, this action receives a (+).

triggers.name: "I'm a Teapot!"
triggers.text: Place this model anywhere within 6" in base contact with terrain.

actions.name: Laughing Footfalls
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model chooses either toward or away. Move the target up to 5" in the chosen direction from this model.

triggers.name: "I'm a Teapot!"
triggers.text: Place this model anywhere within 6" in base contact with terrain.

triggers.name: Liquid Illusion
triggers.text: Enemy only. Once per activation. Make a Scheme marker anywhere in the area between this model and the target.

actions.name: Lifting Spirits
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. Target heals 2. If this action receives a raise, the target may remove a token.

extraction_notes: Minion characteristic includes (3) indicating model_limit of 3
